intro: Sudhaar Welfare Organization & Drug Rehabilitation Center is a non-profit initiative dedicated to supporting individuals affected by drug addiction and social vulnerability. Based in Attock, the organization works to promote awareness, provide guidance, and assist in the rehabilitation of those struggling with substance abuse.

Our focus is on creating a supportive environment where individuals can begin their journey toward recovery. We aim to address not only the physical aspects of addiction but also the psychological and social challenges that come with it. Through community engagement, awareness programs, and support services, we strive to reduce the impact of drug addiction on individuals, families, and society.

In addition to rehabilitation support, Sudhaar Welfare Organization is committed to helping vulnerable members of society, including the underprivileged, by connecting them with resources, care, and opportunities for a better future. We believe that lasting change begins with awareness, compassion, and collective effort. By working together with the community, we aim to build a healthier and more responsible society.
